title: [setup] Project scaffolding
body:
**Category:** setup
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** none
**Produces:** `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `vite.config.ts`, `index.html`, `CLAUDE.md`, directory structure

## Description

Bootstrap the Gungeon project. Vite + TypeScript + React + Three.js + Zustand + Howler.js. Create the full directory structure from `docs/tdd/overview.md`. Generate `CLAUDE.md` with exact commands, code rules, project structure, integration rules, and ownership rules verbatim from the TDD overview.

## Inputs

- `docs/tdd/overview.md` — CLAUDE.md spec, module structure, tech stack

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `npm install` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run dev` starts Vite dev server
- [ ] `npm run build` produces production build
- [ ] `npm run lint` runs ESLint
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` runs `tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` exists in repo root with exact content from TDD overview
- [ ] All directories from module structure exist (`src/ecs/`, `src/systems/`, `src/gameloop/`, `src/input/`, `src/rendering/`, `src/dungeon/`, `src/audio/`, `src/ui/`, `src/store/`, `src/config/`, `src/types/`, `tests/`, `test-specs/`, `asset-specs/`, `config/`)
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode enabled, no `any`
- [ ] React renders a minimal root component

title: [component] ECS World
body:
**Category:** component
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-003, TEMP-005
**Produces:** `src/ecs/world.ts`

## Description

Implement the lightweight ECS world: entity storage as sparse set of component maps keyed by EntityId. Supports creating/destroying entities, adding/removing/getting components, and querying entities by component set.

See `docs/tdd/entities.md` architecture section.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `createEntity()` returns unique EntityId
- [ ] `destroyEntity(id)` removes all components for that entity
- [ ] `addComponent(id, componentName, data)` attaches component
- [ ] `removeComponent(id, componentName)` detaches component
- [ ] `getComponent(id, componentName)` returns component or undefined
- [ ] `hasComponent(id, componentName)` returns boolean
- [ ] `query(componentNames[])` returns all entities with ALL listed components
- [ ] Handles ~700 entities without perf issues
- [ ] Tests cover create, destroy, add, remove, query
- [ ] Tests verify query returns only entities with ALL requested components

title: [system] CollisionDetectionSystem
body:
**Category:** system
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-003, TEMP-005, TEMP-006
**Produces:** `src/systems/collisionDetectionSystem.ts`

## Description

Implement CollisionDetectionSystem with spatial hash grid from `docs/tdd/systems.md`. Static colliders inserted once at level load. Dynamic colliders re-inserted each frame. Produces CollisionPair array.

**Function signature:** `collisionDetectionSystem(world: World): CollisionPair[]`

**Properties:**
- Spatial hash grid with cell size 2x largest dynamic collider
- Every overlapping AABB pair appears in output (no false negatives)
- Trigger colliders produce pairs (handled by response, not here)
- Order: lower EntityId first in each pair
- Static colliders only inserted on `rebuildStatics()` call

**Performance:** ~3200 pair checks/frame at peak. See systems.md Performance Budget.

**Test spec:** `test-specs/TEMP-013.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Spatial hash grid implemented
- [ ] No false negatives for overlapping AABBs
- [ ] Static vs dynamic entity separation
- [ ] Deterministic pair ordering (lower ID first)
- [ ] CollisionPair includes overlapX/overlapY
- [ ] Tests implementing test spec pass
- [ ] No regressions

title: [system] PlayerControlSystem
body:
**Category:** system
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-005, TEMP-006, TEMP-009, TEMP-004
**Produces:** `src/systems/playerControlSystem.ts`

## Description

Implement PlayerControlSystem from `docs/tdd/systems.md`. Translates InputState into player entity changes: velocity from movement, rotation from aim, fire requests, reload, dodge roll initiation, interact/upgrade/pause flags.

**Function signature:** `playerControlSystem(world: World, input: InputState, dt: number): void`

**Properties:**
- Velocity = normalized(moveX,moveY) * movementSpeed
- SpeedModifier multiplies velocity if present
- Rotation.y = atan2(aimWorldY - pos.y, aimWorldX - pos.x)
- fireSidearm → set activeSlot=Sidearm, fireRequested on sidearm gun (if ammo, not reloading, cooldown<=0)
- fireLongArm → set activeSlot=LongArm, fireRequested on long arm gun
- reload → start reload on active gun
- dodgeRoll → initiate if cooldown<=0 and not rolling
- Rolling overrides velocity with roll direction * roll speed
- openUpgrade → transition to GunUpgrade if gun has XP for any trait
- pause → transition to Paused

**Test spec:** `test-specs/TEMP-016.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All input translations implemented per properties
- [ ] Velocity normalized for diagonal movement
- [ ] SpeedModifier applied
- [ ] Fire requests set correctly
- [ ] Tests implementing test spec pass

title: [system] DodgeRollSystem
body:
**Category:** system
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-005, TEMP-006, TEMP-004
**Produces:** `src/systems/dodgeRollSystem.ts`

## Description

Implement DodgeRollSystem from `docs/tdd/systems.md`. Manages dodge roll state: rolling timer, cooldown, velocity override, invincibility.

**Function signature:** `dodgeRollSystem(world: World, dt: number): void`

**Properties:**
- While rolling: velocity = rollDirection * rollSpeed, Invincible component added
- rollTimer decrements by dt. When <=0: isRolling=false, remove Invincible
- cooldownRemaining decrements by dt (always). Cannot roll while >0
- On roll start: cooldownRemaining = dodgeRollCooldown, rollTimer = dodgeRollDuration
- Roll direction = movement direction at initiation. If no movement, use facing direction

**Test spec:** `test-specs/TEMP-017.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Roll state managed correctly
- [ ] Invincible added/removed with roll
- [ ] Cooldown prevents spam
- [ ] Velocity overridden during roll
- [ ] Tests implementing test spec pass

title: [system] ProjectileSystem
body:
**Category:** system
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-005, TEMP-006, TEMP-007, TEMP-008, TEMP-004
**Produces:** `src/systems/projectileSystem.ts`

## Description

Implement ProjectileSystem from `docs/tdd/systems.md`. Handles player gun firing, reload timers, projectile spawning. Enemy firing is in EnemyWeaponSystem.

**Function signature:** `projectileSystem(world: World, dt: number): void`

**Properties:**
- fireCooldown -= dt per gun. Cannot fire while >0
- Clear fireRequested each frame (one-frame signal). If was true and conditions met: fire
- On fire: cooldown = 1/fireRate, ammo -= 1
- Empty mag + fire attempt: empty click sound, start reload
- Reload: reloadTimer -= dt. When <=0: ammo = magazineSize, isReloading = false
- Spawn projectileCount bullets via createPlayerBullet with spread, crit roll
- sourceGunSlot set on each bullet for XP attribution
- Both guns reload simultaneously (passive background reload)

**Test spec:** `test-specs/TEMP-018.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Fire cooldown mechanics correct
- [ ] fireRequested consumed and cleared each frame
- [ ] Reload timer and ammo restoration
- [ ] Correct bullet count and spread
- [ ] Crit roll using critChance/critMultiplier
- [ ] Both guns tick reload independently
- [ ] Tests implementing test spec pass

title: [system] CollisionResponseSystem
body:
**Category:** system
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-005, TEMP-006, TEMP-007, TEMP-013, TEMP-004
**Produces:** `src/systems/collisionResponseSystem.ts`

## Description

Implement CollisionResponseSystem from `docs/tdd/systems.md`. Interprets collision pairs based on component composition. The full response table is in systems.md — 15+ interaction types including: Player+Wall (push out), Player+Enemy (push apart, melee damage), Player+EnemyProjectile (damage), Player+Pickup (flags), Player+Hazard (DamageOverTime/SpeedModifier), PlayerProjectile+Enemy (damage, shield check, pierce, bounce), PlayerProjectile+Wall (destroy or bounce), SuicideBomber contact explosion, Player immune to own bouncing bullets.

**Function signature:** `collisionResponseSystem(pairs: CollisionPair[], world: World, eventQueue: EventQueue): void`

**Properties:**
- Every pair handled exactly once
- Push-out along axis of minimum overlap for solid colliders
- Triggers never produce push-out
- Piercing: decrement piercingRemaining, track alreadyHit
- Bouncing: reflect velocity, decrement bouncesRemaining
- Invincible entities take no damage
- Bomber contact: set health=0, hasExploded=true, area damage query

**Test spec:** `test-specs/TEMP-019.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 15+ response types from table implemented
- [ ] Push-out correct for solid colliders
- [ ] Triggers don't push
- [ ] Shield angle check correct
- [ ] Piercing/bouncing mechanics
- [ ] Bomber explosion with radius query
- [ ] Player immune to own projectiles
- [ ] Tests implementing test spec pass

title: [system] DamageSystem
body:
**Category:** system
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-005, TEMP-006, TEMP-007
**Produces:** `src/systems/damageSystem.ts`

## Description

Implement DamageSystem from `docs/tdd/systems.md`. Processes DamageEvents: reduces health, routes through shield→armor→health, writes lastDamageSourceGunSlot for kill attribution.

**Function signature:** `damageSystem(world: World, eventQueue: EventQueue): void`

**Properties:**
- Damage reduces shield first (if >0), then armor, then health. Clamp at 0.
- Shield hit: reset timeSinceLastHit to 0
- If source is player projectile: write sourceGunSlot to target.health.lastDamageSourceGunSlot
- Emit ParticleEvent (BloodSplat/Sparks)
- Emit AudioEvent (EnemyHitFlesh/EnemyHitArmor)
- Emit DamageNumberEvent
- Crits pre-calculated by ProjectileSystem

**Test spec:** `test-specs/TEMP-020.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Shield→armor→health damage routing
- [ ] Shield timeSinceLastHit reset
- [ ] lastDamageSourceGunSlot written for player projectile damage
- [ ] Events emitted correctly
- [ ] Tests implementing test spec pass

## Description

Implement DeathSystem from `docs/tdd/systems.md`. Handles entity death: enemy loot drops (XP gems, currency, health), bomber explosion (with hasExploded check), boss victory, player death.

**Function signature:** `deathSystem(world: World, eventQueue: EventQueue): void`

**Properties:**
- Enemy health<=0: read lastDamageSourceGunSlot, spawn XP gem for that gun entity, roll currency/health drops, emit particles/audio, destroy entity
- SuicideBomber health<=0: if !hasExploded → trigger explosion (area damage). If hasExploded → skip explosion. Both cases: standard loot drops, destroy
- Boss health<=0: transition to Victory
- Player health<=0: transition to Death

**Test spec:** `test-specs/TEMP-023.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] XP gems spawned with correct gun entity attribution
- [ ] Currency/health drops rolled per design params
- [ ] Bomber explosion only if !hasExploded
- [ ] Boss death → Victory state
- [ ] Player death → Death state
- [ ] Tests implementing test spec pass

title: [integration] Game loop — fixed timestep orchestration
body:
**Category:** integration
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** All system tickets (TEMP-012 through TEMP-034, TEMP-046, TEMP-048), TEMP-006, TEMP-007, TEMP-004
**Produces:** `src/gameloop/gameLoop.ts`

## Description

Implement the fixed-timestep game loop from `docs/tdd/overview.md` and `docs/tdd/systems.md`. Calls all 26 systems in the correct execution order at 60Hz. Handles delta time accumulation, spiral-of-death protection (maxFrameTime cap). Provides start/stop/freeze/resume API for state transitions.

**Execution order:** Input → PlayerControl → DodgeRoll → AI → Projectile → EnemyWeapon → Movement → CollisionDetection → CollisionResponse → Damage → ShieldRegen → Hazard → Lifetime → Pickup → Chest → Shop → GunXP → Destructible → Door → Spawn → FloorTransition → Death → ExpireModifiers → Particle → Audio

GunStatSystem called on-demand, not in loop.

**Test spec:** `test-specs/TEMP-062.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Fixed timestep at 60Hz (0.01667s)
- [ ] All systems called in correct order
- [ ] Spiral-of-death protection: excess time discarded at maxFrameTime
- [ ] start/stop/freeze/resume API
- [ ] Event queue cleared each frame
- [ ] Tests implementing test spec pass

title: [integration] Wire UI to app state machine
body:
**Category:** integration
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-010, all UI tickets (TEMP-049 through TEMP-061), TEMP-062, TEMP-063
**Produces:** `src/App.tsx`, `src/main.tsx`

## Description

Wire the top-level React app to the Zustand app state machine. App.tsx reads currentState and renders the correct component tree. Mount Three.js canvas during gameplay-related states, unmount during menu states. Handle state entry/exit effects (start game loop, freeze, resume, stop, etc.).

**Test spec:** `test-specs/TEMP-065.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] App.tsx renders correct component per AppState
- [ ] Three.js canvas mounted for Gameplay/Paused/GunComparison/GunUpgrade/ForcedUpgrade/ShopBrowse
- [ ] Three.js canvas unmounted for Loading/MainMenu/WeaponSelect/Death/Victory/Settings
- [ ] Game loop started on Gameplay entry from WeaponSelect
- [ ] Game loop frozen on Paused/overlay states
- [ ] Game loop resumed on return to Gameplay
- [ ] Game loop stopped on MainMenu transition
- [ ] Full flow: Loading → MainMenu → WeaponSelect → Gameplay → Death → MainMenu works
- [ ] Tests implementing test spec pass

title: [integration] Wire effects and audio pipeline
body:
**Category:** integration
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-043, TEMP-044, TEMP-045, TEMP-046, TEMP-047, TEMP-048, TEMP-062, TEMP-063

Wire particle system events to particle renderer. Wire audio events to audio manager. Wire damage number events to damage number renderer. Wire screen shake/flash triggers to screen effects manager. Ensure all event producers (DamageSystem, DeathSystem, CollisionResponse, etc.) correctly flow through to visual/audio output.

- [ ] AudioEvents produce sounds

title: [verification] Core systems and rendering verification
body:
**Category:** verification
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-063, TEMP-064
**Produces:** Bug tickets if issues found

## Description

Verification checkpoint: the game compiles, runs, and renders. A dungeon is generated, entities are visible, the player can move, enemies spawn and chase, bullets fire, collision works, enemies die and drop loot.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run dev` starts without errors
- [ ] `npm test` — all tests pass
- [ ] Game renders a dungeon with walls, floor, entities
- [ ] Player moves with WASD
- [ ] Player can shoot
- [ ] Enemies visible and react to player
- [ ] Collision detection works (player blocked by walls)
- [ ] If any issues found, file bug tickets

body:

title: [config] Sound manifest
body:
**Category:** config
**Automation:** auto
**Depends on:** TEMP-047

Create the sound manifest JSON file with entries for all 35 SoundId values. Each entry has: path, volume, pitchMin, pitchMax, maxInstances, loop. Placeholder paths point to generated tone files. FireAmbient and WaterAmbient have loop:true.

- [ ] Schema matches config.md
- [ ] FireAmbient and WaterAmbient have loop:true
- [ ] All other sounds have loop:false
